mobile.description: Wallet integration fails completely - cannot race from the app

desktop.description: External wallet connects but functionality still broken

embed_metadata.location: fc:miniapp meta tag in HTML head

sdk_initialization.timing: Must be called after app loads to hide splash screen

authentication.alternative: Quick Auth for simplified JWT sessions
authentication.key_point: No OAuth 2.0 - user owns cryptographic keys

wallet_access.key_benefit: No wallet selection dialogs - seamless integration

data_model.permissions: No permission scopes - data is public

possible_causes: Missing farcasterMiniApp connector in Wagmi config
Domain mismatch between manifest and hosting

manifest_issues.domain_mismatch: Signed domain must exactly match hosting domain

debugging_checklist.4_check_console: Look for SDK errors in browser console

next_steps_to_diagnose: Read current miniapp.html to see implementation
Verify manifest exists and is properly signed

important_notes.domain_stability: Domain cannot be changed after manifest is published
important_notes.tunnel_limitations: ngrok/localtunnel work for preview but not for addMiniApp() or manifest features
important_notes.security: Transaction scanning via Blockaid - report false positives if needed
